title: Compiling 4.7.2
body:
### Issue Description

Hi
I can compile podman 4.5.0 and 4.6.2

i am running into an issue compiling 4.7.0 and4.7.2 podman


I am building it with this

make all PREFIX="/usr" ETCDIR="/etc" MANDIR="/usr/man"

and it hangs during make

make[1]: Entering directory '/tmp/podman-4.7.0/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/tools'
go build -o build/go-md2man ./vendor/github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2
make[1]: Leaving directory '/tmp/podman-4.7.0/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/tools'
mkdir -p docs/build/man
/usr/local/bin/man: line 7: /usr/bin/man: No such file or directory


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Download 4.6.2 compiles file
2. Run same command 4.7.0 or 4.7.2 and hangs during make
3. cant compile


### Describe the results you received

Something is causing it to hang here.

I traced it to  containers/podman/test/        makefile

.PHONY: docdir
docdir:
	mkdir -p docs/build/man

.PHONY: docs
docs: $(MANPAGES) ## Generate documentation
	@ln -sf $(CURDIR)/docs/source/markdown/links/* docs/build/man/


and then the line I get in the console

mkdir -p docs/build/man
/usr/local/bin/man: line 7: /usr/bin/man: No such file or directory

### Describe the results you expected

To finish building the man files and finish compiling

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

go is  properly setup

### Additional information

Using same dependencies are 4.6.2 when I compiled that.

comments.body:
We only support the latest version. So does this build with podman 5.3?

A quick look shows that the man page validation was added in https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/11ffea313b659a12c0ee4d146afae264da3f2629 so you need man installed to build the man pages.

Probably needs adding to the documentation here: https://podman.io/docs/installation#build-and-run-dependencies

For ubuntu and debian the package to install is called `man-db`

installed man-db and got a bit further

mkdir -p docs/build/man
/usr/bin/man: can't execute tbl: No such file or directory
/usr/bin/man: can't execute nroff: No such file or directory
/usr/bin/man: command exited with status 255: /usr/libexec/man-db/zsoelim | /usr/libexec/man-db/manconv -f UTF-8 -t ISO-8859-1//IGNORE | tbl | nroff -mandoc -rLL=136n -rLT=136n -Tutf8
installed package groff and it worked! thank you very much
